title: Device for sealing up between wind boxes with different pressures in travelling grate facilities
abstract: The present invention relates to a device for thermal treatment of bulk material, comprising a travelling grate chain being capable of revolving in direction of movement consisting of an endless travelling grate (1) with moveable links and a plurality of grate carriages (3). The grate carriages (3) each consist of a frame (30) with end pieces (33) on which carrying wheels (31) are mounted and grate rods (35) being arranged on crossbars (32). Furthermore, the device comprises wind boxes (41, 43) which are arranged such that from at least one wind box (41, 43) gas flows through the grate carriages (3) and their grate rods (35) from or into the wind boxes. At least one profile (50, 51) being pre-stressed during operation is provided which is arranged such that a component (50) during normal operation in at least one position of the travelling grate (1) is in contact with two crossbars (32).
claims: Claims Patent claims: 1 . A device for thermal treatment of bulk material, comprising a travelling grate chain being capable of revolving in direction of movement consisting of an endless travelling grate (1 ) with moveable links, a plurality of grate carriages (3) each consisting of a frame (30) with end pieces (33) on which carrying wheels (31 ) are mounted, and grate rods (35) being arranged on crossbars (32), and wind boxes (41 , 43) which are arranged such that from at least one wind box (41 , 43) gas flows through the grate carriages (3) and their grate rods (35) from or into the wind boxes, characterized in that at least one profile (50, 51 ) being pre-stressed during operation is provided which is arranged such that a component (50) during normal operation in at least one position of the travelling grate (1 ) is in contact with two crossbars (32). 2. The device according to claim 1 , characterized in that the pre-stress of the profile 50 is caused by at least one further pre-stressed profile 51 . 3. The device according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the pre- stressed profile (50), when the crossbar (32) is not deformed, is pre-stressed with a ratio of maximum bending stress to yield point of the material of > 0.2. 4. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the profile (50) is a plate being arranged in horizontal direction or being bent. 5. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the profile (50) is a trapezoid plate. 6. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that at least two further profiles (51 ) are arranged on top of each other and are kept together by a center bolt and/or spring clips. 7. The device according to claim 6, characterized in that between the at least two further profiles (51 ) plastic and/or a lubrication is provided. 8. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the at least one profile (50) in the pre-stressed state has a concave form either by a region which is branching off of a center part at two opposite sides in an angle of between 1 and 179 Â° or by being curved with respect to a center part. 9. The device according to claim 8, characterized in that the at least one further profile (51 ) is at least one C profile (51 1 ), at least two C profiles being arranged on top of each other (51 2 ) and/or at least one L profile (513). 10. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the thickness of the at least one profile (50) decreases into the direction of two opposite sides. 1 1 . The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that during normal operation of the travelling grate (1 ) always two grate carriage crossbars (32) are in contact with the profile (50). 12. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that everywhere where the direction of the flow of the gas changes between two wind boxes (41 , 43) always two grate carriage crossbars (32) are in contact with the profile (50). 13. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the profile (50) between the at least two wind boxes (41 , 43) is formed of a metallic material having a thickness of 1 -50 mm. 14. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the profile (50) is made up of steel. 15. The device according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the profile (50) can be lowered. 16. A method for thermal treatment of bulk material, comprising a travelling grate chain being capable of revolving in direction of movement comprising an endless travelling grate with moveable links, a plurality of grate carriages each consisting of a frame with wheels and grate rods being arranged on crossbars and wind boxes which are arranged such that gas flows through the grate carriages and their grate rods from or into the wind boxes, characterized in that two adjacent wind boxes are sealed up against each other by the fact that the crossbars of the grate carriages are guided over a pre-stressed profile and that in at least one position at least one grate carriage crossbar is in contact with the pre-stressed profile.
